introSection: Nanchang Sunac Land (Chinese: 南昌融创乐园; Pinyin: Nánchāng róng chuàng lèyuán) is a theme park in Nanchang, Jiangxi, China. It opened on the 28th of May 2009. It was the first theme park to be opened by the Sunac China Holdings group.
fullText: Nanchang Sunac Land (Chinese: 南昌融创乐园; Pinyin: Nánchāng róng chuàng lèyuán) is a theme park in Nanchang, Jiangxi, China. It opened on the 28th of May 2009. It was the first theme park to be opened by the Sunac China Holdings group.
